name: resourcePrefix
description: An abbreviation to include in all the Azure resource names that Invictus deploys, often an environment name.

name: location
description: The main Azure location where Invictus deploys its resources, some advanced resources can be configured with their own location.

name: customTags
description: A set of Azure resource tags to apply to all to the deployed Invictus resources.

name: useResourceLocks
description: Feature flag to control whether the deployed Azure resources have [resource locks](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-resource-manager/management/lock-resources).

name: timesequencerFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Time Sequencer component.

name: sequenceControllerFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Sequence Controller component.

name: xmlJsonConverterFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the XML-JSON Converter component.

name: xsdValidatorFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the XML-JSON Converter component.

name: regexTranslatorFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Regex Translator component.

name: transcoV2FunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Transco component.

name: pubsubV2FunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the PubSub component.

name: exceptionHandlerFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Exception Handler component.

name: invictusTimeSequencerFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Time Sequencer component.

name: invictusExceptionHandlerFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Exception Handler component.

name: invictusPubSubV2FunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the PubSub component.

name: invictusRegexTranslatorFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Regex Translator component.

name: invictusSequenceControllerFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Sequence Controller component.

name: invictusTranscoV2FunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Transco component.

name: invictusXmlJsonConverterFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the XML-JSON Converter component.

name: invictusXsdValidatorFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the XSD Validator component.

name: timeSequencerScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options of the Time Sequencer component.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: memoryResources
properties.description: The amount of memory resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: scaleMinReplicas
properties.description: The lowest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale in to.

properties.name: scaleMaxReplicas
properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: concurrentRequests
properties.description: When the number of HTTP requests exceeds this value, then another replica is added. Replicas continue to add to the pool up to the maxReplicas amount. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: exceptionHandlerScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options of the Exception Handler component.

name: appInsightsName
description: The name of the Azure Application Insights resource that tracks the general telemetry of the Framework components.

name: LogAnalyticsWorkspaceAppInsightsName
description: The name of the Azure Log Analytics workspace that collects all Azure Application Insights resources deployed.

name: appInsightsSamplingPercentage
description: The sampling percentage for the Azure Application Insights that tracks the general telemetry of the Framework components.

name: serviceBusNamespaceName
description: The name of the Azure Service Bus namespace resource where the PubSub component controls its messages.

name: serviceBusSkuName
description: The pricing tier of the Azure Service Bus, used by the PubSub component.

name: pubSubV2TopicName
description: The name of the Azure Service Bus topic, used by the PubSub component to send/receive messages from.

name: approvedMessageSizeInBytes
description: The maximum byte threshold where the PubSub component applies the claim-check functionality.

name: serviceBusMessageTimeToLiveMinutes
description: The time limit of the send Azure Service Bus messages by the PubSub component, see [Microsoft's messages expiration](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/service-bus-messaging/message-expiration) for more details.

name: deferralMessageThresholdInMinutes
description: The PubSub component will try to recover Azure Service Bus messages older than this time limit that were stuck in deferral.

name: autoResubmitDeferredMessages
description: Indicates whether the PubSub component should automatically resubmit/recover an Azure Service Bus message older than the deferral time limit.

name: pubSubSubscriptionLockTimeoutInMinutes
description: The amount of time in minutes the PubSub component locks an Azure Service Bus message received on a topic subscription.

name: storageAccountName
description: The name of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by all Framework components.

name: storageAccountType
description: The pricing tier of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by all Framework components.

name: storageAccountMinimumTLSVersion
description: The minimum allowed TLS version of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by all Framework components.

name: disableStorageAccountPublicNetworkAccess
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Storage Account should disable public network access. If `true`, only private endpoints or VNET integration are allowed.

name: allowStorageAccountSharedKeyAccess
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Storage Account allows authentication via a shared key access.

name: blobContainerPrefix
description: An custom abbreviation to include in the claim-check Azure Blob Storage container name, used by the PubSub component.

name: messageStatusCacheDeleteAfterDays
description: The time period (in days) after which the storage policy deletes the message status Azure Storage Account table.

name: keyVaultName
description: The name of the shared Azure Key Vault, used by all Framework components.

name: keyVaultEnablePurgeProtection
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Key Vault should be protected against purging.

name: containerAppsEnvironmentName
description: The name of the [Azure Container App environment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/environment).

name: containerAppsEnvironmentLocation
description: The Azure location for the Azure Container Apps and their environment.

name: acaIdentityName
description: The name of the user-assigned identity that pulls the container images from the Azure Container Registry.

name: containerRegistryName
description: The name of the Azure Container Apps registry that hosts the Framework components' container images.

name: containerRegistryUrl
description: The server URL of the Azure Container Apps registry that hosts the Framework components' container images.

name: caeVnetInfraRgName
description: The name of the Azure Container Apps infrastructure resource group ([when VNET is enabled](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/custom-virtual-networks?tabs=workload-profiles-env)).

name: identityProviderApplicationId
description: The application ID of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates managed identity authentication for the Azure Container Apps, hosting the Framework components.

name: identityProviderClientSecret
description: The client secret of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates managed identity authentication for the Azure Container Apps, hosting the Framework components.

name: devOpsObjectId
description: The object ID associated with the service principal of the enterprise application that the Azure DevOps service connection is created for.

name: invictusUserManagedIdentityName
description: The name of the Azure user managed identity that has access to all the deployed Azure Container App components.

name: customApplicationIds
description: A list of additional IDs referring to custom Microsoft Entra ID applications that should also be able to access the Azure Container Apps hosting the Framework components.

name: vnetName
description: The name of the Azure Virtual Network (VNET) resource that forms the base for all network-related rules and subnets throughout.

name: serviceBusSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Service Bus namespace resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: storageAccountSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Storage Account resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: keyVaultSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Key Vault resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: containerAppEnvironmentSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the network rules of all the Azure Container App resources, useful for VNET deployments.

name: containerAppEnvironmentSubnetName
description: The name of the subnet to form the network rules of the Azure Container App environment, useful for VNET deployments.

name: vnetResourceGroupName
description: The name of the Azure resource group where the VNET network rules deploys to.

name: dnsZoneSubscriptionId
description: The Azure subscription ID to control the private DNS zone throughout, useful for VNET deployments.

name: dnsZoneResourceGroupName
description: The name of the Azure resource group where the private DNS zone deploys to.

name: enableVnetSupport
description: Feature flag to control whether the Framework deploys within a VNET.

name: useOpenAPI
description: Feature flag to control whether the Framework components deploys with OpenAPI/Swagger specifications
